title: Tinker Transplant
description: This Mod transplants and changes something in TConstruct 2 to TConstruct 3.
body:
# Tinker Transplant
This mod aims to transplant contents from TiC2 to 3, now including Tinker Shurikens and Arrows, with a few differences with those in TiC2 for balances.
## Tinker Shuriken
![Player taking the Tinker Shuriken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1b7a40cf6e2a0b4deda3a3f49a7624b06511c28.jpeg)

 Tinker Shurikens can trigger the melee attack damage modifiers.
![The effect of shuriken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31ae7246dfd6fdfae1782de87eaa179ec735347.jpeg)

 It combines two small blades and two tool handles.
![How to make Tinker Shurikens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d731d34cd7566f3bbbbfb4a90b6d75061bca3f45.jpeg)

## Tinker Arrow
 Tinker Arrows combines a arrowhead, a tool handle and an arrow fletching.  
![How to make Tinker Arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d86384004f608712e6ea1e034188a5710855a57.jpeg)

 It can be shot by all kinds of bows and crossbows, even by your hands and trigger the melee attack damage modifiers too.
 The Tinker Arrow is just like a simple arrow mixed with trident.

 Loyal Arrow Reycling Modifier: Allow your arrows to fly back just like the Trident with Loyalty.
![Loyal Arrow Reycling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46774243f384440f2786cb8d10757cdc1b764447.jpeg)

Reload Tinker Arrows Modifier: Add it to your Tinker Bows or Crossbows and you can shoot Tinker Arrows by reducing the arrows' durability instead of consuming the amount of the arrows' stack.
![Reload Tinker Arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45aec9153f49a63a37dc894ecf9d3902c5822d21.jpeg)

Like Fish In Water Modifier: Let your Tinker Arrows fly in water like Trident without water drag.
![Like Fish In Water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ca5b60b4eb99e70d278f8cd06f2577edad7b631.jpeg)
